title: galeopsis tetrahit var. verlotii
intro: Galeopsis tetrahit var. verlotii, also known as hemp-nettle or hemp-nettle galeopsis, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Galeopsis tetrahit var. verlotii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis tetrahit var. verlotii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
